# FFERR_INVALIDDOWNLOADID | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_INVALIDDOWNLOADID ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_invaliddownloadid)

-  FFERR_INVALIDDOWNLOADID 

Global Variable# FFERR_INVALIDDOWNLOADID

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_INVALIDDOWNLOADID: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_invaliddownloadid#Discussion)

The effect index provided by the API in downloadID is not recognized by the IOForceFeedbackLib driver.
